title: Secret Detection Validity Checks Troubleshooting
text:
Secret Detection Validity Checks Troubleshooting

When to use this runbook?

Use this runbook for troubleshooting production issues related to the validity checks feature.

Validity checks monitoring is the preferred
dashboard for identifying reliability issues. Sidekiq dashboard can supplement, follow runbook .

Partner API high error rate

Error rate exceeds 10% on dashboard (alert: SecretDetectionPartnerAPIHighErrorRate ).

Identify affected partner(s) in dashboard breakdown.

Identify affected partner(s) in dashboard breakdown.

Check error type: network_error : Connectivity issues rate_limit : Rate limit exceeded response_error : Invalid/unparseable response

network_error : Connectivity issues

rate_limit : Rate limit exceeded

response_error : Invalid/unparseable response

Review partner status pages: AWS GCP Postman

Review partner status pages:

Check recent deployments: git log --oneline -10 ee/lib/security/secret_detection/partner_tokens/

Check recent deployments:

If partner has known incident (< 1 hour): Wait for recovery

If network error (multiple partners): Coordinate with SRE in #production

If response error: Likely API contract change - file issue in #g_ast-secret-detection

If persistent (> 6 hours): Disable partner

Partner API high latency

P95 latency exceeds 5 seconds on the dashboard (alert: SecretDetectionPartnerAPIHighLatency ).

Check if systemic (all partners) or partner-specific.

Check if systemic (all partners) or partner-specific.

Review partner status pages for degraded performance.

Review partner status pages for degraded performance.

P95 latency exceeds 5 seconds on the dashboard (alert: SecretDetectionPartnerAPIHighLatency ).

Check if systemic (all partners) or partner-specific.

Check if systemic (all partners) or partner-specific.

Review partner status pages for degraded performance.

Review partner status pages for degraded performance.

Test partner API from teleport Rails console: uri = URI ( 'https://sts.amazonaws.com/' ) start = Time . now Net :: HTTP . start ( uri . host , uri . port , use_ssl : true ) do | http | http . request ( Net :: HTTP :: Get . new ( uri . path )) end puts "Latency: #{ Time . now - start } s"

Test partner API from teleport Rails console:

P95 less than 10 seconds and improving: Monitor—issue resolves itself

P95 exceeds 10 seconds sustained (more than 24 hours): Disable partner

Rate limits hit frequently

Exceeds 0.1 req/sec sustained for 5 or more minutes on the dashboard (alert: SecretDetectionPartnerAPIRateLimitHit ).

Identify partner(s) hitting limits.

Identify partner(s) hitting limits.

Check current limits in ee/lib/gitlab/application_rate_limiter.rb : partner_aws_api : { threshold : -> { 400 }, interval : 1 . second } partner_gcp_api : { threshold : -> { 500 }, interval : 1 . second } partner_postman_api : { threshold : -> { 4 }, interval : 1 . second }

Check current limits in ee/lib/gitlab/application_rate_limiter.rb :

Check Sidekiq queue depth using teleport: Sidekiq :: Queue . new ( 'security_secret_detection_partner_token_verification' ) . size

Check Sidekiq queue depth using teleport:

Check current limits in ee/lib/gitlab/application_rate_limiter.rb :

Check Sidekiq queue depth using teleport: Sidekiq :: Queue . new ( 'security_secret_detection_partner_token_verification' ) . size

Check Sidekiq queue depth using teleport:

Check for burst patterns: Large pipeline or multiple projects scanning.

Check for burst patterns: Large pipeline or multiple projects scanning.

Queue less than 1k jobs: Normal, will clear within 1 hour

Queue 1k–10k jobs: Monitor queue size—rate limiter auto-throttles processing

Queue exceeds 50k jobs: Temporarily disable partner

Persistent throttling (more than 24h): Update rate limits or disable partner

Network errors to partner APIs

Exceeds 0.5 errors/sec for 5 or more minutes on the dashboard (alert: SecretDetectionPartnerAPINetworkErrors ).

Check which partner(s) affected.

Check which partner(s) affected.

Verify connectivity from Rails console using teleport: # Test AWS uri = URI ( 'https://sts.amazonaws.com/' ) begin Net :: HTTP . get_response ( uri ) puts "✓ AWS reachable" rescue => e puts "✗ AWS unreachable: #{ e . message } " end # Test GCP uri = URI ( 'https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v1/tokeninfo' ) begin Net :: HTTP . get_response ( uri ) puts "✓ GCP reachable" rescue => e puts "✗ GCP unreachable: #{ e . message } " end

Verify connectivity from Rails console using teleport:

Check DNS: dig sts.amazonaws.com

Check for firewall changes in #infrastructure .

Check for firewall changes in #infrastructure .

Verify connectivity from Rails console using teleport:

Check DNS: dig sts.amazonaws.com

Check for firewall changes in #infrastructure .

Check for firewall changes in #infrastructure .

Check logs for SSL errors using data view pubsub-sidekiq-inf-gprd* : json.class:PartnerTokenVerificationWorker AND "SSL"

Check logs for SSL errors using data view pubsub-sidekiq-inf-gprd* :

Single partner affected: Likely partner-side disabled partner, monitor status page.

Multiple partners affected: Likely GitLab network issue, coordinate with SRE.

SSL/TLS errors: Check certificate validity, might need CA bundle update.

Emergency disable (GitLab.com)

Edit ee/lib/security/secret_detection/partner_tokens/registry.rb :

Re-enable after incident

Verify issue is resolved: Partner status is operational, network OK, error rate down.

Make code change to re-enable partner.

Monitor the dashboard for 10 minutes: Error rate less than 2%, queue depth less than 1k, P95 less than 5 seconds.

Manual token verification

To verify a token without waiting for the background job, use the Rails console (teleport):

Team: Secret Detection (@gitlab-org/secure/secret-detection)

Slack : #g_ast-secret-detection

On-call: Check #production for SRE availability

Quick checklist: Issue confirmed on the dashboard Checked partner status pages Reviewed recent code deployments Checked logs for errors Tried turning off partner (for emergency situations)
